name: Hunga Tonga-Hunga Ha'apai
eruptionHistory: The January 15, 2022 eruption was one of the most powerful volcanic events in recorded history. The blast sent a plume into the mesosphere and generated a global shockwave detectable worldwide.
description: The 2022 Hunga Tonga eruption was the largest atmospheric explosion recorded by modern instruments. It sent water vapor into the stratosphere, generated global tsunamis, and created a sonic boom that circled the Earth multiple times.
